description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker/compose:1.23.2 image with a docker:dind service, sets variables BUNDLE_GEMFILE, DOCKER_DRIVER, DOCKER_HOST, POSTGRES_IMAGE_TAG, RAILS_ENV, and RUBY_IMAGE_TAG, and runs a before_script that creates a Docker volume named bundler_data and two Docker networks named frontend and backend. Define a single stage called build and a build job in that stage that executes: cd /builds/isqad/ubastation; docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.development.yml up -d uba-pg; docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.development.yml run --rm uba-app bundle install --without production --deployment --jobs 4; until docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.development.yml run --rm uba-app nc -z uba-pg 5432; do echo 'Waiting pg...'; sleep 3; done; docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.development.yml run --rm uba-app bundle exec rake db:migrate; docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.development.yml run --rm uba-app bundle exec rspec. No artifacts, caches, or rules are defined.
